title: columnea lanata
intro: Columnea lanata, a flowering plant native to Central America, is a type of epiphyte that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Columnea lanata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its leaves can be dried and used in teas or as a tincture.
